option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# CV Setup Instructions
Your About page has been updated with complete CV sections including:
## 1. CV Download Button - File path expected: `/public/CV_Md_Minhazul_Islam.pdf` - The download link points to: `href="/CV_Md_Minhazul_Islam.pdf"`
## 2. CV Online View Section - The page has an embedded CV preview in the "Full CV" section - You can customize the education, skills, and languages information
## 3. To Add Your Actual CV PDF:
### Option A: Using an Online Tool (Recommended) 1. Create your CV using: - Google Docs → Download as PDF - Canva → Download as PDF - Microsoft Word → Export as PDF - Any modern resume builder
2. Name the file: `CV_Md_Minhazul_Islam.pdf`
3. Place it in the `public` folder: `F:\MMI-Portfolio\public\CV_Md_Minhazul_Islam.pdf`
### Option B: Using Node.js (jsPDF library) If you want to generate PDFs programmatically, you can: 1. Install: `npm install jspdf` 2. Create a script to generate the PDF with your information
## 4. What's Included in Your About Page:
✓ Introduction with your photo ✓ Why you chose Applied Computer Science (Electronics-ICT) ✓ Unique hobbies (Robotics, Game Dev, Photography, Rock Climbing) ✓ Technical Skills (organized by category) ✓ Soft Skills (8 key competencies with descriptions) ✓ Future Vision (Short, Medium, and Long-term goals) ✓ CV Section (View Online + Download buttons) ✓ Full CV Preview (Education, Skills, Languages)
## 5. Customization Tips:
- Update skills in the "Technical Skills" section - Modify hobbies to match your actual interests - Update the "Full CV" section with your real data - Add your actual PDF file to the public folder
## 6. Theme Settings:
Your portfolio is set to Light Mode by default with: - Background: White (#FFFFFF) - Primary Color: Indigo (#6366f1) - Secondary Color: Violet (#8b5cf6) - Accent Color: Pink (#ec4899)
